title: .gitignore file
content:
# ----------------------
# macOS
# ----------------------
.DS_Store
.AppleDouble
.LSOverride
Icon?
._*
.Spotlight-V100
.Trashes
ehthumbs.db
Thumbs.db

# ----------------------
# Python
# ----------------------
__pycache__/
*.py[cod]
*$py.class

# Virtual environments
venv/
env/
.venv/
ENV/
env.bak/

# Distribution / packaging
build/
dist/
*.egg-info/
.eggs/
*.egg

# Jupyter notebooks
.ipynb_checkpoints

# Test / coverage reports
.coverage
.tox/
.pytest_cache/

# ----------------------
# Node.js / JavaScript
# ----------------------
node_modules/
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*
pnpm-debug.log*
package-lock.json
yarn.lock
.pnpm-debug.log

# Build outputs
dist/
build/
.cache/
.next/
out/

# ----------------------
# VS Code
# ----------------------
.vscode/
.history/

# ----------------------
# General
# ----------------------
*.log
*.tmp
*.swp
*.swo

title: git important cmd
content:
# 🔹 Clone repo
git clone <repo-url>
cd <repo-name>
code .                        # open in VS Code

# 🔹 Check branch & status
git status
git branch
git log --oneline --graph --decorate

# 🔹 Create & switch branches
git checkout -b feature/my-change
git checkout main

# 🔹 Stage & commit changes
git add .
git commit -m "Describe what you changed"
git diff                       # see unstaged changes
git diff --staged              # see staged changes

# 🔹 Sync with remote
git pull origin main           # update local main
git push origin feature/my-change
git push origin main

# 🔹 Merge workflow
git checkout main
git pull origin main
git merge feature/my-change
git push origin main

# 🔹 Cleanup branches
git branch -d feature/my-change
git push origin --delete feature/my-change
